records.title: Dark Sci-Fi Audio Pack (site ambience beds)
records.creator: SRG774
riskNotes: Already shipped under public/sounds/music/ with credits in MUSIC_CREDITS.md

records.title: Kenney UI Pack (2D)
records.creator: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
riskNotes: Clean readable UI but generic Kenney look — risk of 'asset flip' recognition
Better as temporary prototype chrome than final brand UI
records.notes: Discovery only — do not download until human approval

records.title: Kenney Input Prompts
records.creator: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
riskNotes: Useful for settings/keybinds; style is neutral enough to tint

records.title: Kenney RPG Audio
records.creator: Kenney (www.kenney.nl)
riskNotes: Generic RPG SFX — OK for prototype; prefer original procedural cries for Riftlings

records.title: Game-icons.net icon set (selective)
records.creator: Lorc, Delapouite, and contributors
riskNotes: Per-icon license varies — must verify author folder before import
Attribution required for CC BY icons on credits page
Silhouette style may clash with painted Riftwilds UI — use sparingly

records.title: Poly Haven — forest / ground textures (reference)
records.creator: Poly Haven artists
riskNotes: Photogrammetry PBR — photoreal, not native to Riftwilds 2D hybrid look
Best as lighting/material reference or heavily stylized bake, not direct tiles

records.title: ambientCG — nature PBR materials
records.creator: Lennart Demes / ambientCG
riskNotes: Same photoreal risk as Poly Haven for 2D game tiles
Confirm license page at import time (historically CC0)

records.title: Freesound — CC0 nature / portal ambience (selective)
records.creator: Various (per sound)
riskNotes: Must filter CC0 only — many Freesound clips are CC BY / NC / Sampling+
Per-file page review mandatory before any download
Do not bulk-scrape; respect rate limits and ToS

records.title: OpenGameArt — Liberated Pixel Cup base assets
records.creator: LPC contributors
riskNotes: Classic OGA pack often dual-licensed CC-BY-SA / GPL — SA copyleft may be unacceptable for closed commercial game assets
Style is classic RPG maker pixel — clashes with Riftwilds painted hybrid
Do not import until counsel/product accepts license category
records.notes: Held in LICENSE_REVIEW due to likely ShareAlike — not approved for runtime

records.title: Kenmi Cute Fantasy tileset (style reference only)
records.creator: Kenmi (unverified pack page for this import)
riskNotes: Art direction cites Kenmi-quality as a bar, not as a licensed pack import
Commercial itch listings often require purchase + specific license text
No blind import — verify exact pack license page before any download
records.notes: Explicitly blocked from pipeline until verified commercial-use license exists

records.title: Wikimedia Commons — public domain nature photos (mood refs)
records.creator: Various
riskNotes: Reference only — not game sprites
Each file needs its own license check; some categories mix licenses

records.title: GitHub mirrors of Kenney / OGA packs
records.creator: Kenney / various mirrors
riskNotes: Prefer original kenney.nl / OpenGameArt pages over third-party mirrors
Mirrors may omit attribution files or re-license incorrectly
